auto_builder_2_upload_capability.note: Auto Builder 2 health check reports Drive move/folder/receipt tools, but drive upload tools are removed from the primary route. Uploaded chat images must be manually uploaded or handled by an upload-capable surface before Auto Builder can move/index them.

drive_root_policy.duplicate_root_rule: Use the active root that contains 10 Model System and Auto Social structure. Do not scatter source truth across duplicate Eden Skye roots.
